statement: Sample labels are biological-unit proxies; an explicit mouse-to-library key is unavailable.
Age-batch status is UNKNOWN because preparation/run fields do not establish separation.
mTEC1 Loxl2 uses n=2+2 inferential libraries and remains sparse/depth-limited.
edgeR/limma remain BLOCKED_RSCRIPT_UNAVAILABLE; no Phase 9 statistical result was added.
Exact external subtype replication is NOT_ESTABLISHED for all four claims.
GSE231906 is sample-unit detection context among uniquely joined barcodes only.
GSE231906 has zero high-confidence independent persons; no donor-level aging inference is allowed.
No protein, spatial, mechanistic, functional or causal assay was performed.
GSE223049 is broad sorted bulk; E-MTAB-8560 is related TEC context and contains no fibroblast mapping.
CORE and RELEASE_DERIVED pass; FULL_LOCAL remains PARTIAL_REPRODUCTION for documented inventory/environment scope.
Phase 4 is same-cohort annotation sensitivity; medFB filtering asymmetry is retained.
Phase 8 rankings are experimental planning outputs, not scientific evidence.
